reports.title: Docs Index Table
reports.description: Displays a sortable Docs Viewer index table for a selected docs scope.

presets.title: Library Documents Admin
presets.description: Management report for reviewing Library documents by title, doc_id, and viewability.

reports.title: Reports List
reports.description: Displays the configured Docs Viewer report metadata from the report registry.

reports.title: Source Config
reports.description: Displays Docs Viewer source config for all scopes in manage mode.

reports.title: Semantic References
reports.description: Displays generated semantic-reference targets and source docs.

reports.title: Docs Broken Links
reports.description: Runs the Docs Viewer broken-links audit for a selected scope.
